post.summary: Send OTP to a mobile number
post.description: Sends a 4-digit OTP to the provided mobile number and stores it in cache for 5 minutes.

post.summary: Verify OTP for a mobile number
post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the mobile number. Returns a token for registered users or indicates new user status.
Register a new user with selected interest categories.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Updates the user profile with the provided information.
Update the authenticated user's preferred language.
Update the authenticated user's favorite categories/interests.

get.description: Retrieve all bookmarked news for the authenticated user.

post.description: Bookmark a news article for the authenticated user.

news_id.description: ID of the news to bookmark

message.example: The news id field is required.

delete.description: Remove a bookmarked news article for the authenticated user.

news_id.description: ID of the bookmarked news to remove

message.example: The news id field is required.

get.description: Retrieve all watch histories for the authenticated user.

post.description: Add a news item to the authenticated user's watch history.

delete.description: Remove a watch history record for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve all categories with optional search filter
Fetch all breaking news based on the authenticated user's language preference.
Fetch all trending news based on the authenticated user's language preference.
Fetch news details by ID based on the authenticated user's language preference.
Fetch all news records that contain a video. Title and description are returned according to the authenticated user's selected language.

description.example: This is the video news description.

get.description: Fetch news details by slug according to the authenticated user's selected language.

description.example: This is the detailed news description.

get.description: Fetch category details along with all associated news and media based on the authenticated user's selected language.
Fetch all active banners whose start date and end date are within the current date range.

Fetch all news created by the authenticated reporter. Optionally filter news by status (pending, approved, rejected). News title and description are returned according to the user's selected language.
Retrieve details of a specific news item created by the authenticated reporter, including associated media.

404.description: News not found or does not belong to the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new news article with multilingual content, multiple images and YouTube video URLs.

put.description: Update an existing news article. Supports adding/removing media. Videos must be YouTube URLs.

video_urls[].description: Add YouTube video URLs (send as video_urls[])

remove_media_ids.description: Media IDs to remove from this news

delete.description: Delete a news article created by the authenticated reporter.

get.description: Get dashboard statistics for the authenticated reporter.
Retrieve a list of all media records.

sanctum.description: Enter the Bearer token received from POST /verify-otp
